function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0006
alias: helios_backfill_intake_audit
issued_on: 2025-12-18
total_eur: 520
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 260
    line_eur: 520
---
# Helios intake audit invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0006                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_intake_audit   |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-18                     |
| total_eur      | 520                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 2   | 260      | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from the first phase when the work was mostly diagnosis and process-mapping.

next_step.current_state: Invoice note updated successfully with schema-shaped frontmatter and original body preserved verbatim. Reactive outbox-writing check is not applicable to this finance-note write; no outbound document was created. Next required cleanup is deleting the processed inbox item, which was already read earlier.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by adding YAML frontmatter to the specified invoice note and preserving the existing note body verbatim below it. Removed the inbox item after successful completion.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements (tree, root AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read OCR/migration workflow docs and finance schema, preserved the original body verbatim under frontmatter, kept the diff focused, and deleted the inbox item after successful structured-record maintenance per inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
function.outcome_justification: The source invoice note explicitly contained all required invoice-schema fields from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md: record_type invoice, invoice_number INV-0006, alias helios_backfill_intake_audit, issued_on 2025-12-18, total_eur 520, counterparty Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH, project Helios Workflow Sprint, related_entity Claudia Reiter, and one visible line item with quantity 2, unit_eur 260, and line_eur 520. This made the OCR/frontmatter migration fully supported by the visible note data.
